---
title: "Component Mapping"
---

This page maps the main component groups to the three architectures.

| Phase | Electricity Export | Centralised Hydrogen | Decentralised Hydrogen |
|---|---|---|---|
| Turbine generator | Generator | Generator | Generator |
| In-turbine conversion | Generator to DC to AC | Generator to DC to AC | Generator to DC to H2 |
| Infield transport preparation | Transform to 66 kV | Transform to 66 kV | Compress to about 150 bar |
| Infield grid | 66 kV AC cables | 66 kV AC cables | 150 bar pipelines |
| Offshore collection | Substation | Substation / electrolyser platform | None |
| Offshore central conversion | AC to HVDC | AC to DC to H2 to compressed H2 | None |
| Offshore export | HVDC cable | Hydrogen pipeline | Hydrogen pipeline |
| Onshore conversion or delivery | HVDC to AC grid | Hydrogen backbone | Hydrogen backbone |

The component pages document assumptions by physical component. Architecture pages document how those components are combined.
